moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships begin today, bringing two weeks of elite tennis action to London.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: New balls please! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces today. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's officially Pimm's and strawberries & cream season! Wimbledon starts today. Game, set, match!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues its group stage matches this week, building anticipation for the knockout rounds starting July 4th.

angles.name: Group Stage Heat
angles.copy: World Cup group stage drama continues this week! Who's looking strong for the knockouts?

angles.name: Road to Knockouts
angles.copy: The fight for World Cup glory heats up! Only a few more days of group stage action before the last 16.

moments.title: Katherine Jenkins is 46
moments.blurb: Welsh mezzo-soprano Katherine Jenkins, one of the UK's most successful classical artists, celebrates her 46th birthday today.

angles.name: Welsh Voice
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus to our very own Welsh national treasure, Katherine Jenkins, who turns 46 today! What's your favourite performance?

angles.name: Classical Star
angles.copy: Celebrating 46 years of incredible talent! Happy Birthday to the phenomenal Katherine Jenkins.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK continues to deliver daily drama and romance from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: What a night in the Love Island villa! Did you catch all the drama? Tell us your thoughts!

angles.name: Coupling Up
angles.copy: Who's coupled up and who's on the rocks? Love Island UK is still delivering the summer heat!

moments.title: Debbie Harry is 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! Still cool as ice. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Heart of Glass
angles.copy: Call Me! It's Debbie Harry's 81st birthday on Wednesday. A true legend of rock and new wave.

moments.title: Missy Elliott is 55
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st.

angles.name: Supa Dupa Birthday
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The incredible Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Wednesday. A true innovator!

angles.name: Legendary Producer
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! Her influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Sufjan Stevens is 51
moments.blurb: Critically acclaimed indie folk artist Sufjan Stevens celebrates his 51st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Indie Darling
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the brilliant Sufjan Stevens on Wednesday! A master of intricate storytelling and sound.

moments.title: Vince Clarke is 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Wizard
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke on Thursday! The man behind so many iconic synth-pop hits.

angles.name: Erasure Genius
angles.copy: From Depeche Mode to Erasure, Vince Clarke has shaped the sound of decades. Celebrating his 66th on Thursday!

moments.title: Post Malone is 31
moments.blurb: Chart-topping rapper and singer Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Rockstar Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone this Friday! Which of his hits is your go-to?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: From 'Sunflower' to 'Circles', Post Malone has dominated the charts. Wishing him a happy 31st on Friday!

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: It's the Heart of Rock & Roll! Happy 76th Birthday to Huey Lewis this Saturday.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Remember 'The Power of Love'? Celebrating the 76th birthday of Huey Lewis this weekend!

moments.title: 50 Cent is 51
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go Shorty, It's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Sunday. What's your top track from the rap icon?

angles.name: Hip Hop Mogul
angles.copy: From music to TV, 50 Cent has built an empire. Wishing him a happy 51st birthday this Sunday!

moments.title: Ringo Starr is 86
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Drummer
angles.copy: Peace and Love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 on Monday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Yellow Submarine
angles.copy: All aboard! Celebrating the 86th birthday of music legend Ringo Starr this Monday. Still drumming strong!

moments.title: Beck is 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning alternative artist Beck Hansen celebrates his 56th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the genre-bending artist Beck on Tuesday! What's your favourite of his eclectic tracks?

moments.title: Courtney Love is 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Goddess
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fearless Courtney Love on Wednesday! A true force in rock music.

angles.name: Hole Frontwoman
angles.copy: Celebrating 62 years of punk rock attitude and powerful music. Happy Birthday, Courtney Love!

moments.title: Wireless & TRNSMT Festivals Approaching
moments.blurb: Major UK festivals Wireless (July 12-14) and TRNSMT (July 11-13) are just around the corner, bringing huge lineups to London and Glasgow.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Who's ready for Wireless and TRNSMT next weekend? The countdown is on for two massive UK festivals!

angles.name: Glasgow Getaway
angles.copy: TRNSMT is almost here, Glasgow! Get ready for a huge weekend of music in the city. Who are you buzzing to see?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays have started or are starting this week for many pupils in Scotland and Northern Ireland.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Scotland and Northern Ireland! What are your big plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Summer Fun
angles.copy: Long lie-ins and no homework! Wishing all students in Scotland and Northern Ireland a fantastic summer break!

moments.title: Who's Number 1?
moments.blurb: The UK Official Singles Chart continues to be a hot topic, with artists battling for the coveted top spot.

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: Who's currently dominating the UK Singles Chart? Drop your predictions for this week's number one!

angles.name: Tune of the Week
angles.copy: What's your current favourite track in the Official UK Singles Chart? Tell us what's on repeat!
